rows.title: TOC's Terry Xu ordered to pay more than $154,000 in costs to Shanmugam, Tan See Leng
rows.author: Straits Times: Selina Lum
rows.summary: In a significant cost assessment, the High Court has ordered TOC's Terry Xu to pay over $154,000 in legal costs to Ministers K. Shanmugam and Tan See Leng.

rows.title: Fees collected by govt agencies legal and proper, even though not set out in law, says MND
rows.author: Straits Times: Tham Yuen-C
rows.summary: The passage of the Statutes (Miscellaneous Amendments) Bill has sparked intense debate over the retroactive validation of agency-prescribed fees.
